name: Nanjing Editorial Desk
shortBio: Maintains Nanjing coverage with a focus on history pacing, district choice, and practical city stays that do not feel overbuilt.
fullBio: The Nanjing Editorial Desk maintains guides, place pages, and planning coverage related to Nanjing. Its focus is helping readers balance historic sites, river and wall areas, and practical hotel choices so the city feels coherent rather than like a checklist of separate detours.
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for route coherence, district tradeoffs, and whether the guidance still reflects practical Nanjing travel conditions.
seoTitle: Nanjing Editorial Desk | China Travel Notes
seoDescription: Meet the desk that maintains Nanjing guides, place pages, and planning coverage on China Travel Notes.
